title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
desc: When snake venom strikes her husband, Ponchomi discovers her hidden mystical powers. She sets off on a perilous spiritual quest, battling dark odds to bring him back to life. S01 E135.

title: Ponchomi
desc: Srimoyee adopts young Tara to keep her safe, unaware of a looming shadow. She must protect the girl from Agharnath, a dark necromancer obsessed with sacrificing Tara for immortality. S01 E25.

title: Behula
desc: Driven by pure devotion, a courageous woman decides to challenge death itself. She risks everything to resurrect her husband and his six siblings, while also rescuing their lost ships. S01 E86.

title: Nishir Daak

title: Nishir Daak
desc: Srimoyee adopts five-year-old Tara to protect her from danger, unaware that the dark necromancer Agharnath seeks to sacrifice the child in a deadly ritual to gain immortality.

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
desc: Sadhak Bamakhyapa chronicles 18th-century saint Bamakhyapa's devout worship of Goddess Tara, blending spirituality and miracles.
